name: artisana-root
description: Root package.json to manage the Artisana ecosystem

scripts.build: npm install --prefix ArtisanaWebsite/skillhub-africa/frontend && npm run build --prefix ArtisanaWebsite/skillhub-africa/frontend && cd ArtisanaWebsite/skillhub-africa/backend && (pip install -r requirements.txt || echo 'Pip not available') && (python manage.py collectstatic --noinput || echo 'Python not available') && cd ../../../ && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); try { if (!fs.existsSync('public_html')) fs.mkdirSync('public_html'); fs.cpSync('ArtisanaWebsite/skillhub-africa/frontend/.next/standalone', 'public_html', {recursive:true, force:true}); fs.cpSync('ArtisanaWebsite/skillhub-africa/frontend/.next/static', 'public_html/.next/static', {recursive:true, force:true}); fs.cpSync('ArtisanaWebsite/skillhub-africa/frontend/public', 'public_html/public', {recursive:true, force:true}); console.log('Deployment successfully prepared in public_html for Hostinger Node.js runtime'); } catch(e) { console.error('Packaging failed:', e.message); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix ArtisanaWebsite/skillhub-africa/frontend && cd ArtisanaWebsite/skillhub-africa/backend && pip install -r requirements.txt
